title: Ride the surf, not the dry hair: 11 herbal teas for relief
description: Eucalyptus globulus teas have been used to help with dry hair due to its high content of antioxidants and essential oils. The tea contains compounds like eucalyptol, alpha-pinene, and beta-pinene, which have anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties. These compounds help to soothe dryness, reduce dandruff, and promote a healthy scalp.
